residuals.risk: Synthetic conformance is mistaken for physical detection performance.
residuals.disposition: Keep sensitivity, specificity, range and environmental performance unverified until exact physical campaigns exist.
residuals.stop_condition: Any physical performance claim without an exact evidence pack blocks promotion.

residuals.risk: Acoustic sensing becomes continuous remote surveillance.
residuals.disposition: Default to local features only; raw capture stays disabled unless bounded, encrypted, authorized and audited.
residuals.gate_or_task: open-spec-beacons and every acoustic adapter gate
residuals.stop_condition: Continuous recording, speech transcription, voiceprint or unrestricted streaming blocks conformance.

residuals.risk: An extension bypasses safety semantics with free-form measurements.
residuals.disposition: Require an isolated namespace, closed observation schema and privacy/threat reviews; inherit no presence claims.
residuals.stop_condition: An unregistered field or inherited presence claim blocks the extension.

residuals.risk: Reusable datasets hide omitted environments or negative results.
residuals.disposition: Require provenance, license, negative results, omitted classes and explicit non-representativeness.
residuals.stop_condition: Missing provenance, license or omitted-class disclosure blocks the dataset manifest.

residuals.risk: Potentially life-saving raw material remains sensitive after an incident.
residuals.disposition: Preserve before deletion during an active case, then require reviewed incident-close disposition and receipt.
residuals.gate_or_task: OS-08 conformance kit and incident close SOP
residuals.stop_condition: Silent deletion or indefinite unreviewed retention blocks implementation promotion.

residuals.risk: Modalities sharing a beacon or environmental cause are counted as independent.
residuals.disposition: Corroboration requires distinct beacons and distinct declared independence groups.
residuals.stop_condition: Shared-cause evidence counted independently blocks conformance.

residuals.risk: Placement, clock and baseline assumptions produce unsupported localization or direction.
residuals.disposition: Keep direction, range and triangulation unavailable until geometry, calibration and uncertainty are physically evidenced.
residuals.stop_condition: Metric localization from beacon count alone blocks promotion.

residuals.risk: Missing or failed modalities are silently synthesized.
residuals.disposition: Require capability-driven operation and visible capabilities_absent in every projection.
residuals.stop_condition: A missing capability represented as observed blocks conformance.

residuals.risk: Silence, no trigger or low heat is interpreted as victim absence.
residuals.disposition: Require unknown or abstention and prohibit negative presence inference.
residuals.stop_condition: Any automatic absence claim blocks conformance.

residuals.risk: Sensors are repurposed for identity, biometrics or diagnosis.
residuals.disposition: Prohibit identity, attributes, voiceprint, identifiable thermal reconstruction and medical claims.
residuals.stop_condition: A biometric, identity or diagnosis output blocks conformance.

residuals.risk: A high-bandwidth extension overwhelms the selected bearer.
residuals.disposition: Keep material local or require a separately conforming transport/storage profile with measured limits.
residuals.gate_or_task: OS-07 reference builds and OS-08 conformance kit
residuals.stop_condition: An extension depending on undeclared bearer capacity blocks implementation promotion.
